hero.title: THÉONÉ Global Desk
hero.subtitle: Cross-border Business Operations
hero.desc: There is no need to hire a dedicated global team for every cross-border task. THÉONÉ Global Desk acts as your Fractional Global Operations Team on demand, immediately executing cross-border administration, global partnership coordination, and project management.

services.title: Global Desk Services
services.desc: We focus on core business administration and PMO tasks ready for immediate execution.

quick.title: Quick Desk | Single Global Task Execution
quick.target: Best for: Resolving immediate bottlenecks in single cross-border operations.
items: Drafting and reviewing official English correspondence for overseas buyers/partners
Refining English presentation materials for global meetings and conference calls
Establishing administrative guardrails and checklists prior to cross-border contracts
Basic pooling of local professionals and regional market regulation research

mission.title: Mission Desk | Single International Mission
mission.target: Best for: Delegating an independent international mission from infrastructure setup to completion.
items: Overall administrative process and detailed condition coordination for overseas contracts
Analyzing global partner requirements and proposing alternative operations
Pitching proposals and initial coordination to secure overseas local partners and experts
Close response to sudden operational bottlenecks and issues during cross-border progress

project.title: Project Desk | Cross-border Project PMO
project.target: Best for: Milestone management across complex projects involving multiple stakeholders, such as global expansion, investment, and contracts.
items: Executing entry strategies for global hubs (e.g., North America, Middle East) and building local operational infrastructure
Orchestrating global communication throughout overseas investment attraction projects
End-to-end PMO lead from global partner discovery to contract finalization

innovation.title: Next-Gen Smart Workflow Infrastructure
innovation.notice1: We are developing next-generation global workflow control infrastructure in the R&D stage in collaboration with KAIST.
innovation.item1: Developing an AI-based pre-screening solution to reduce the administrative burden of reviewing English NDAs during global expansion.
innovation.item2: Developing a payment control solution to mitigate email fraud and remittance risks in global trade.
innovation.notice2: We welcome inquiries from those interested in PoC participation and tech partnerships for this project.

international.title: Korea Operator Channel for International Partners
international.notice: A dedicated track for international partners needing a practical cooperation channel in Korea.
international.inbound: For international companies entering the Korean market and seeking a reliable local operations partner.
international.value: We help international partners settle in the Korean market by providing backend support for communication coordination with local stakeholders, contract assistance, and local administrative setup.

about.title: About THÉONÉ
about.identity: THÉONÉ is a global desk where practitioners who understand both technology and regulations directly execute cross-border business operations.
about.compliance: This service provides business administration and project management (PMO) support, explicitly excluding legal advice, in strict compliance with Article 109 of the Attorney-at-Law Act.
about.philosophy: Complex cross-border operations, in the most practical way.
about.founderDesc: A New York-licensed attorney with a software engineering background, supporting cross-border business operations where technology and regulation meet.

contact.title: Request Quote & Inquiry
contact.success: Your inquiry has been successfully submitted. We will get back to you shortly.
